text.title: Unit Testing (FIRST + AAA) Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract the subagent applying unit-testing must produce. Required fields, forbidden patterns, allowed transformations, plus valid + invalid worked examples.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

required.field: % of tests with visible AAA sections.

forbidden.pattern: No tests that touch a real database, network socket, or filesystem outside `tmp_*`.
No `time.now()` style flakiness — inject a clock.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Order arrays deterministically by their natural key (slug, id, name) before serialising.
Round numeric values to 2 decimal places when serialising.

example.note: Missing the first required field and `forbidden_seen` is non-empty — schema rejects both.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
